description: An annuity holder requests a partial withdrawal from their contract.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract holder and the amount they wish to withdraw.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the customer and confirms the withdrawal amount.

nodes.task_description: Determine if any surrender charges or tax penalties apply.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent determines the withdrawal is within the penalty-free amount.

nodes.task_description: Process the withdrawal and mail the check to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully processes the withdrawal and issues the payment.
